reference: Hi, I have a low-grade fever, a heavy head, and body aches. My fever comes and goes since yesterday. Yesterday, in addition to those symptoms, I also had a sore throat. Please suggest any natural remedies and what this could be. It all started after I had a tub of ice cream and hot green tea, just after the ice cream. I stay in Switzerland, and there is no pharmacy open at this hour except for the hospital, which is very far from home. Debashree Ganguly, Fribourg, Switzerland.
text: Hi, I have a low grade fever, a heavy head, and body aches. My fever comes and goes since yesterday. Yesterday, in addition to those symptoms, I also had a sore throat. Please suggest any natural remedies and what this could be. It all started after I had a tub of ice cream and hot green tea just after the ice cream. I stay in Switzerland and there is no pharmacy open at this hour except for the hospital, which is very far from home. De Breschy, Ganguly, Freeborg, Switzerland.
